**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  
**Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

### Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Status |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 months | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan |
| CU-002 | 18 months | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well; weight gain improving |
| CU-003 | 51 months | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27 |

### Quick assessment
- **CU-001:** Parameters appear stable in current config.
- **CU-002:** Parameters appear stable in current config.
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; active monitoring is warranted given early treatment stage.

### PK model note
This summary reflects the current stored dosing parameters. A separate review of live PK model monitoring/status is recommended if a formal model-health confirmation is needed.", recipients="") ]
